name: SATSUKI In The... "Forbidden PANTS"?
description:
𝙽𝚘𝚝 𝚎𝚡𝚊𝚌𝚝𝚕𝚢 𝚏𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚊 𝚂𝚝𝚞𝚍𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝙿𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎 𝙷𝙴𝚁. 𝙵𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚠𝚊𝚒𝚜𝚝 𝚞𝚙, 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚢𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚔𝚜 𝚐𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝. 𝙵𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚠𝚊𝚒𝚜𝚝 𝚍𝚘𝚠𝚗? 𝚆𝚎𝚕𝚕, 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚢'𝚛𝚎 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚖𝚘𝚜𝚝 "𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚒𝚐𝚒𝚘𝚞𝚜" 𝙿𝙰𝙽𝚃𝚂 𝚂𝚊𝚝𝚜𝚞𝚔𝚒 𝚠𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚛...

ART: SmogAI

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18/AGED UP

Second Satsuki Kiryūin "parody" bot I've made. Man, why is this shit so fun to make? 😭

HEYA, MY SKELETONSSSSS! 🗣💀 Yep, I know, I was away for a few days. Sorry about that. </3

But to make up for it, I'm bringing you this irreverent little Satsuki bot with those... phew, "FORBIDDEN pants"... 🤤 Damn, why are people going crazy over them lately, man?

But yeah, you know I make these kinds of bots quickly and for laughs. I mean, why not, right? 😂 Although I'll be adding others that were... slow-cooked. ;) You know, ones with more substance in the plot and stuff.

Oh, and thank you SO MUCH for the 1k followers! Love you all, pibes. 🥹🫶🏻

Enjoy.
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
